question: Bitcoin $65K in May?
textDescription:
The market resolves “Yes” if Bitcoin (BTC) reaches or dips below $65,000 USD at any point in May 2026, based on data from Coinbase. The price must be reflected as the high/low price in any 1-minute candlestick during the month. If Bitcoin does not hit $65K during May 2026, the market resolves “No.”

Resolution Date & Time: May 31, 2026, at 23:59 PT, or earlier if Bitcoin crosses $65K at any time during the month.
newsShortReason: Bitcoin's current price is $74,974, significantly below $65,000, with no indication of reaching that level in May.
